app.rdg: 1. Tu hoyutob o a kwi Sherk-Siam kwi boku stab?
1. tuhuyut…ôb îu î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i b…ôk º ∑ stab?
1. was+made Q by the sky nobleman the all thing
1. Was everything made by God?
E, tu hoyutob a kwi Sherk-Siam kwi boku stab.
îi, tuhuyut…ôb î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i b…ôk º ∑ stab.
yes was+made by the sky nobleman the all thing
Yes, everything was made by God.
2. Tsid√Ælh o Sherk-Siam ku tu hoyud ku lilhzihu stobsh Adam ekus lilhzihu sladai Eb?
2. c…ôdi…¨ îu sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i tuhuyud k ∑i li…¨d·∂ªix ∑ stubsÃå Adam îi k ∑si li…¨d·∂ªix ∑ s…¨aday Eb.
2. that Q sky nobleman the made the first man Adam and the first woman Eve
2. Was it God that made the first man, Adam and the first woman, Eve?
E, tsid√Ælh Sherk-Siam ku tu hoyud ku lilhzihu stobsh Adam ekus lilhzihu sladai Eb.
îi, c…ôdi…¨ sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i tuhuyud k ∑i li…¨d·∂ªix ∑ stubsÃå Adam îi k ∑si li…¨d·∂ªix ∑ s…¨aday Eb .
yes. that sky nobleman the made the first man Adam and the first woman Eve
Yes, it was God that made the first man, Adam and the first woman, Eve.
3. Kraa o lesash ku tu hoyutob a kwi Sherk-Siam tlhdahu as halgwa al tsid√Ælh al tu di sherk?
3. xÃåa î îu lesash k ∑i tuhuyut…ôb î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab …¨ud…ôx ∑ îa îs h…ôlg ∑…ô îal c…ôdi…¨ îal tudi î sÃå…ôq?
3. many Q angels the made by the sky nobleman to+be them with him in the sky
3. Did God create many angels so that they could be with Him in heaven?
E, kraa lesash ku tu hoyutob a kwi Sherk-Siam tlhdahu as halgwa al tsid√Ælh al tu di sherk.
îi, xÃåa î lesash k ∑i tuhuyut…ôb î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab …¨ud…ôx ∑ îa îs h…ôlg ∑…ô îal c…ôdi…¨ îal tudi î sÃå…ôq.
yes many angels the made by the sky nobleman to+be them with him in the sky
Yes, God created many angels so that they could be with Him in heaven.
4. Kraa o lesash kwi tu hoyil sa?
4. xÃåa î îu lesash k ∑i tuhuyil sa î.
4. many Q angels the did evil
Did many of the angels do evil?
E, kraa lesash ku tu hoyil sa, lejob ta sdas halgwa ;
îi, xÃåa î lesash k ∑i tuhuyil sa î, lejob ti sda îs h…ôlg ∑…ô ;
yes many angels the did evil, the+devil the name them
Yes, many of the angels did evil. They are called devils.
gula Sherk-Siam tu erwed ta tsahadilh dohu gwed dhual kwi heku hud.
g ∑…ôl sÃå…ôq si îab tu îux ∑…ôd t…ô c…ôdi…¨ d…ôx ∑g ∑…ôd dx ∑ îal k ∑i hik ∑ hud.
so sky nobleman past+send the them down to the big fire
so God therefore cast them down to the big fire.
5. Telh o aschissatob a kwi Sherk-Siam ku dididiecho lesash sihuashulh dhual adaku a kretia?
5. t…ô…¨ îu î…ôscÃå…ôsat…ôb î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i didi îd…ôcÃå'u î l…ôsash six ∑sha î…¨ dx ∑ îal îad…ôk ∑ î…ô kretia î
5. true Q sent by the sky nobleman the one-by-one angels serve+good unto each-and-every of christian
5. Is it true that God sends angels one by one to protect every Christian?
E, telh aschissatob a kwi Sherk-Siam ku dididiiecho lesash sihuashulh dhuall adaku a kretia.
îi, t…ô…¨ î…ôscÃå…ôssat…ôb î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i didi îd…ôcÃå'u î l…ôsash six ∑sha î…¨ dx ∑ îal îad…ôk ∑ î…ô kr…ôtia.
yes, true sends by the sky nobleman the one-by-one angels serve+good unto each-and-every of Christian
Yes, it is true that God sends angels one by one to protect every Christian.
6. Sherk-Siam o ku tu hoyutsid dgwe, 'tlalba stid√Ælh o kwi ashutsbitsid dgwe?
6. sÃå…ôq si îab îu k ∑i tuhuyucid d…ôg ∑i, ∆õ'al º b…ôstidi…¨ îu k ∑i î…ôshuyucbicid d…ôg ∑i.
6. sky nobleman Q the made+you you, also
6. Did God make you, and what were you made for????????
E, Sherk-Siam ku tu hoyuts tsa, 'tlalba tsid√Ælh kwi ashutsbsh tsa.
îi, sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i tuhuyut î…ôca, ∆õ'al º b…ôstidi…¨ k ∑i î…ôshuyuc…ôbsÃå î…ôca.
yes sky nobleman the past+make me,
Yes, God made me...
7. Dhual stab kwi ta adshoyutob a kwi Sherk Siam, 'tlalba asista dhual stab kwi atsashutsob?
7. dx ∑ îal stab k ∑i tuadshuyut…ôb î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab, ∆õ'al º b(…ô)as îist…ô î dx ∑ îal stab k ∑i ads…ôshuyuc…ôb.
7. for what the made by the sky nobleman, also same for what the created+you
7. Why did God create you, and to what end were you created?
Sherk-Siam ku tu hoyuts tsa 'tlalba tsid√Ælh kwa ashutsbsh tsa,
sÃå…ôq si îab k ∑i tuhuyuc î…ôca ∆õ'al º b(…ô)c…ôdi…¨ k ∑i ads…ôshuyuc…ôbsÃå î…ôca,
sky nobleman the past made me ...
God made me ...
red√Ælh tsid√Ælh tsahu haidhu, red√Ælh tsid√Ælh tsahu ra'tleldhu,
xÃå…ôdi…¨ c…ôdi…¨ î…ôca…ôx ∑ haydx ∑, xÃå…ôidi…¨ c…ôdi…¨ î…ôca…ôx ∑ xÃåa∆õ'ildx ∑,
so that_one I know, so that_one I desire
so that I can know him, so that I love him,
red√Ælh tsahu chalad ta sgwas sehelhrachems gula dilh tsahu orduhsherk.
xÃå…ôdi…¨ î…ôca…ôx ∑ cÃåalad ta sg ∑a îs scÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôbs g ∑…ôl di…¨ î…ôca…ôx ∑ îuxÃå ∑dx ∑sÃå…ôq
?? I follow the his+own will, then it I go+up+sky
so that I will follow his will, then I will go to heaven.
